description: NeuroFocus AI is a medium-readiness Vitamins & Supplements innovation built on an AI recommendation engine. As an AI-guided cognitive supplement, it addresses cognitive performance, AI health coaching, personalised nutrition, and is designed to deliver bone and joint strength. Targeted at Germany, it is expected to launch in 2027 at an estimated retail price of 60 (production cost ~19, roughly 68.3% gross margin). It fits consumers seeking data-driven, personalised health outcomes.
